thought.text: I will update the task tracker to show we are reading existing tests and factories.

task_list.title: Read acceptance criteria and plan
task_list.notes: Read and analyze acceptance-criteria.json and .rhino-plan.md to understand the requirements.

task_list.title: Map ACs to tests
task_list.notes: Map each acceptance criterion to existing or new tests.

task_list.title: Read existing tests and factories
task_list.notes: Examine existing tests, factories, and helpers in the codebase.

task_list.title: Write feature and isolation tests
task_list.notes: Write comprehensive integration/feature tests for all ACs, including isolation and Extras.

task_list.title: Run tests and fix failures
task_list.notes: Run the test suite and iterate on fixing any failures.

task_list.title: Update AC status to tested
task_list.notes: Update the status of each AC in acceptance-criteria.json to 'tested'.

task_list.title: Verify coverage and finish
task_list.notes: Perform a final verification of test coverage and complete the stage.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"task_list": [{"title": "Read acceptance criteria and plan", "notes": "Read and analyze acceptance-criteria.json and .rhino-plan.md to understand the requirements.", "status": "done"}, {"title": "Map ACs to tests", "notes": "Map each acceptance criterion to existing or new tests.", "status": "done"}, {"notes": "Examine existing tests, factories, and helpers in the codebase.", "title": "Read existing tests and factories", "status": "in_progress"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Write feature and isolation tests", "notes": "Write comprehensive integration/feature tests for all ACs, including isolation and Extras."}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Run tests and fix failures", "notes": "Run the test suite and iterate on fixing any failures."}, {"status": "todo", "notes": "Update the status of each AC in acceptance-criteria.json to 'tested'.", "title": "Update AC status to tested"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Verify coverage and finish", "notes": "Perform a final verification of test coverage and complete the stage."}], "summary": "Update task tracker: Read existing tests and factories is in_progress.", "command": "plan", "security_risk": "LOW"}

summary: Update task tracker: Read existing tests and factories is in_progress.
